extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won bunch sprint after INEOS took intermediate sprint at 12km with THOMAS, who gained time bonuses moving into top 5 overall.
tactical_patterns: INEOS deployed ROWE to leadout THOMAS for intermediate sprint bonuses at 12km, using sprint points for GC positioning.
BISEGA attacked twice on final climb with 35km gaps, forcing BikeExchange alone to chase for MATTHEWS sprint setup.
Late crashes between 3km-to-go safe zone caught GC riders SCHACHMANN and POZZOVIVO, revealing dangerous positioning window.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: First WorldTour win in 9 months suggests resurgent form weeks before Tour de France, team committed all day.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Actively hunting intermediate sprint bonuses for GC, moved into top 5 overall via time gains.
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: negative: Caught in crash outside 3km safe zone, dropped from second overall to outside top 10.
rider_signals.BISEGA Stefan: positive: Twice attacked final climb solo extending gap to 59 seconds, forcing organized chase response.
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: Caught in crash just outside 3km safe zone, costly GC positioning error in transition zone.
